results.title: Soda Pop - DANCE TUTORIAL | K-Pop Demon Hunters
results.reason: The description highlights a step-by-step approach specifically for beginners, and the 12-minute duration allows for a reasonable pace for the 'Soda Pop' song.
summary: Learn the main moves for this upbeat song
Follow along with clear counts and timing
Master the hand motions and arm shapes
Practice the full routine at a slow pace

results.title: Huntrix - Golden STEP BY STEP Dance Tutorial | K-Pop Demon Hunters |  Easy to Follow
results.reason: With a 24-minute duration and 'Golden Step by Step' in the title, it provides the most thorough instructional breakdown for the specific 'Soda Pop' related content.
summary: Break down every step in great detail
Learn how to move your feet correctly
Follow the teacher from a back view
Build confidence by repeating each dance section

results.title: K-POP DANCE BASICS: Body Control & Power (Tutorial)
results.reason: Part of a structured series by a reputable creator, focusing on the 'why' of body control which is essential for beginner K-pop learners.
summary: Learn how to make your movements look strong
Practice stopping your body at the right time
Improve how you control your arms and legs
Make your dancing look sharp and clean

results.title: K-POP DANCE BASICS: Footwork (Tutorial)
results.reason: Excellent instructional quality focusing on footwork basics, which is a critical 'how-to' for any beginner entering the K-pop space.
summary: Master basic steps used in many K-pop songs
Learn how to shift your weight properly
Improve your balance while moving your feet
Practice simple patterns to build your coordination

results.title: stretch and warm-up routine for *LEARNING K-POP DANCES* 🤸🏽‍♀️🍉✨
results.reason: Provides a necessary foundational routine for beginners to avoid injury, clearly structured into specific time blocks for stretching and warming up.
summary: Get your muscles ready for fast dancing
Follow easy stretches to prevent getting hurt
Wake up your body with light movements
Prepare your joints for better range of motion
